Certified True Copy of Tax Declaration with Documentary stamp

Authority to Use Surname with Documentary stamp
Petition for Clerical Error with service charge and Documentary stamp
Permit (Building & wiring permit, CEI, Fire Code fee, signage, occupancy)
Mayor's Permit (local employment) with Documentary stamp
Mayor's Clearance (local employment, firearms) with Documentary stamp

client_steps.action: Secure queue number for purpose
Present Order of Payment and pay the required fee

requirements.requirement: Any of the following services (see fee schedule)

Building/wiring permit, CEI, Fire Code fee, signage, occupancy permit

services.service_name: Issuance of Tax Declaration for Transfer of Ownership Consolidation/Subdivision
services.who_may_avail: Real Property Owners and other agencies

requirements.requirement: Application Form
Deed of Conveyance
Certified True Copy of OCT/TCT
Clearances from BIR and RD
Tax Clearance or Updated Realty Tax Receipt (after paying Annotation Fee)

client_steps.action: Presents and submits all the requirements

sub_steps.action: Inspects and verifies documents for completeness and validity; Verification from previous record/tax declaration

client_steps.action: Receives payment order form and pays at the cashier

sub_steps.action: Issues payment order form and advises applicant to pay the required fee at the cashier
Pays Annotation Fee per Tax Declaration (₱100.00)

client_steps.action: Receives Transaction Claim Stub with Date of New Tax Declaration Release

sub_steps.action: Issues claim stub to client and explains the variability of new TD release

client_steps.action: Field Inspection and Property Assessment

sub_steps.action: Shall be present, OR send a representative, to accompany the office's Field Personnel during the inspection of the property being transacted most especially if the property has an improvement
Corrects Property Boundaries, assigns new PIN, prepares Field Work map
Conducts Inspection of Property being Transacted
Prepares Inspection Report

client_steps.action: Records the Transaction in the TMCR (Tax Mapping Control Roll)

sub_steps.action: Records the Transaction in the TMCR (Tax Mapping Control Roll)
Prepares Initial FAAS based on Inspection Report
Reviews and preapproves Initial FAAS
Assigns new TD No. and records in the Logbook of Assessment Records
Prepares New Tax Declaration / Notice of Assessment and attaches all pertinent documents
Signs Final FAAS and New TD

client_steps.action: Upon date of return, Receives approved Tax Declaration

sub_steps.action: Issues Owner's copy & Notice of Assessment, and have the claimant sign Office Duplicate and Logbook

services.turnaround_time: 21-35 working days (21 days if no improvement, 35 days if with improvement)

services.service_name: Issuance of Updated Tax Declaration for New or Reassessment of Building/Machineries
services.who_may_avail: Real Property Owners and other agencies

client_steps.action: Present and submit all the requirements (Application Form, Approved Building Permit, Building Plan, Certificate of Completion, Certificate of Occupancy, Previous Tax Declaration, Tax Clearance, Sworn Statement)
Receive Transaction Claim Stub
Wait for release (35 working days) - be present or send a representative to accompany Field Personnel during property inspection
Upon date of return, receive approved Tax Declaration and sign Office Duplicate and Logbook

requirements.requirement: Application Form
Approved Building Permit
Building Plan
Certificate of Completion
Certificate of Occupancy
Previous Tax Declaration (for reassessment)
Tax Clearance or Latest Tax Receipt (for reassessment)
Completely filled-up Sworn Statement

services.turnaround_time: 35 working days (subject to provincial assessor approval for new assessment)

services.service_name: Issuance of Updated Tax Declaration for New or Reassessment of Lands
services.who_may_avail: Real Property Owners and other agencies

requirements.requirement: Application Form
Annotation Fee
requirements.where_to_secure: Issued at Transaction window, paid at Municipal Treasurer's Office

requirements.requirement: Request Letter
Latest Realty Tax Receipt / Tax Clearance
Previous Tax Declaration
requirements.where_to_secure: Owner, as received from Assessor's Office

conditional_requirements.condition: For New Assessment of Untitled Land

requirements.requirement: Approved Survey Plan
requirements.where_to_secure: DENR as surveyed by Licensed Geodetic Engineer

requirements.requirement: Certification that Lot is Alienable & Disposable
Lot Data Computation
AWARD Certificate or MUDHO Certification
Notarized Affidavit of Ownership
requirements.where_to_secure: Notary Public as executed by the Claimant/Declarant

requirements.requirement: Notarized Affidavit of Adjoining Lot Owners
requirements.where_to_secure: Notary Public as executed by adjoining lot owners

requirements.requirement: Certification from Barangay – Possessor and Occupant of Lot

conditional_requirements.condition: For New Assessment of Titled Land

requirements.requirement: Certified True Copy of Title
Approved Survey Plan
requirements.where_to_secure: DENR as surveyed by Licensed Geodetic Engineer

requirements.requirement: Certified True Copy of Free Patent / Homestead / Miscellaneous Sales Application OR the Certified Copy of the DENR Indorsement of the application to RD

client_steps.action: Presents/submits all the requirements
Pays annotation fee and submits receipt to Assessor's Office; Receives Transaction Claim Stub
Early on the 21-35 working days wait, be present (or send representative) to accompany office's Field Personnel during inspection of the property
Upon date of return, receives approved Tax Declaration, Owner's copy & Notice of Assessment, and sign Office Duplicate and Logbook

services.turnaround_time: Variable: 21 working days (reassessment of lands w/o improvement) | 35 working days (reassessment of lands w/ improvement or new assessment of lands w/ or w/o improvement) note: date of release can be variable due to: • volume of transactions • reassessment of lands would most likely entail change in market value and assessed value and is subject to the final approval of the provincial assessor • lands declared for the 1st time whether with or without improvements will always be subject to the final approval of the provincial assessor.

services.service_name: Issuance of Updated Tax Declaration for Corrected Information e.g. Spelling of Name, Lot Area, Lot Number, etc...
services.who_may_avail: Real Property Owners and other agencies

requirements.requirement: Application Form
Request Letter indicating the information that needs correction / update
Latest Realty Tax Receipt / Tax Clearance
Previous Tax Declaration
requirements.where_to_secure: Owner as received from the Assessor's Office

requirements.requirement: Annotation Fee
requirements.where_to_secure: Issued at Transaction window, paid at Municipal Treasurer's Office

conditional_requirements.condition: Provide the following applicable needed proof for the information to be corrected / updated (choose as applicable):

requirements.requirement: Certified True Copy of OCT / TCT
Valid Government Issued ID / Passport
Birth Certificate
Lot Data Computation
Other Pertinent Documents

client_steps.action: Presents/submits all the requirements
Pays annotation fee and submits receipt to Assessor's Office; Receives Transaction Claim Stub

If Transaction falls in the SIMPLE category: 7 working days wait time. If property falls in the COMPLEX category: Early on the 21 or 35 working days wait, be present (or send representative) to accompany the office's Field Personnel during the inspection of the property being transacted
Upon date of return, receives approved Tax Declaration, Owner's copy & Notice of Assessment, and sign Office Duplicate and Logbook

services.turnaround_time: Variable by transaction type: **simple** (real properties with recent assessment not older than 1 year, no field inspection required): **7 working days** **complex** (real properties with assessments older than 1 year, requiring field inspection): - properties without improvements: **21 working days** - properties with improvements: **35 working days** note: date of release can be variable due to: • volume of transactions • simple transactions: no field inspection, approval at local assessor's level only • complex transactions: requires field inspection with longer timeline • if there is an improvement in the property being transacted, reassessment may require approval of the provincial assessor

services.service_name: Issuance of Certified True Copy of Tax Declaration and Other Kinds of Certification
services.who_may_avail: Real Property Owners and other agencies

requirements.requirement: Application Form (indicate: Certified True Copy of TD; No Improvement; No Real Property; Aggregate Property Holdings; Tax Map)
Old Tax Declaration / Realty Tax Receipt
requirements.where_to_secure: Owner as received from Assessor's Office

requirements.requirement: Proof of authorization (if not the owner): SPA; Authorization Letter; Court Order; etc.
Certification Fee (Payment Order Slip from Transaction window)

client_steps.action: Requests for Certified True Copy of TD or other Certification (Must provide Identification and/or authorization from the declarant / property / holdings and other related certifications)
Receives payment order slip and pays in the Municipal Treasurer's Office; Returns to the Office and presents the payment Receipt
Receives requested Certified Copy / Certification

services.processing_time: 3 minutes per real property unit (may increase variably if client requests for older versions of tax declaration - i.e., tracebacks) note: depending on how many certified copies / certifications are requested, the transaction time can be faster or take longer.

services.service_name: Issuance of Community Tax Certificate (Individual and Corporation)
services.who_may_avail: All Los Baños residents, Business Owners

requirements.requirement: Individuals 18 years old and above and Corporation
Community Tax Certificate / Valid ID
Certificate of Withholding Tax

client_steps.action: Secure queue number for purpose
Presents all the requirements and provides information
Fill up Community Tax Certificate based on the information given by the taxpayer

fees.description: Individual - Basic community tax, Individual - Additional community tax (based on salary/gross receipts: P1.00 for every P1,000.00), Corporation - Basic community tax, Corporation - Additional community tax (based on real property: P2.00 for every P5,000.00 OR gross receipts: P2.00 for every P5,000.00)

services.service_name: Payment of Fees for Sealing and Licensing of Weights and Measure Instrument
services.who_may_avail: All vendors and business establishments using weight and measure instruments

requirements.requirement: Weight and measure instrument

client_steps.action: Ask for Schedule of calibration (gasoline station) or For vendors, present weighing instrument upon inspection
Wait for the calibration process

sub_steps.action: If test fails, inform the owner (either confiscate or lock in the pumps and nozzles) - Identify the instrument as defective or tampered
If successful, Pay the fees Pursuant to the provisions of the Local Revenue Code

client_steps.action: Present the Weight and Measure Instrument
Pay the fees

fees.description: Depending on the number of pumps and storage (for gasoline station) and on the weight and measure instrument of business establishment/owner

services.service_name: Issuance of Building Permit (Highly Technical Transaction)
services.type_of_transaction: G2G – Government to Government; G2C - Government to Citizen
services.who_may_avail: Prospective house and/or building owners within the jurisdiction of Los Baños

requirements.requirement: Five (5) copies of filled-up and Notarized Unified Application Form for Building Permit
requirements.where_to_secure: Municipal Engineering Office and MEO Facebook Page

requirements.requirement: Three (3) photocopies of Valid PRC Licenses (I.D.) of all involved professionals (Engineers, Architects, etc.)
Four (4) copies of Notarized estimated value of the building structure to be erected
Four (4) sets of Drawing Plans (Signed and sealed by Engineers/Signed by Owner)
Three (3) sets of Lot Plan (Signed and sealed by Geodetic Engineer)
Four (4) copies of General Specifications (Signed and sealed by Engineer)
Three (3) photocopies of Original Certificate of Title (OCT)/Transfer Certificate of Title (TCT), and/or Deed of Absolute Sale and Lot Locational Plan from LRA
Three (3) photocopies of Updated Tax Receipt
Construction Safety and Health Program (CSHP - DOLE)
Barangay Building Clearance
Other Agencies as maybe required related to the structure to be constructed (LLDA, DENR, NWRB, etc.)

client_steps.action: Present and submit all the required documents
Payment to the cashier at Municipal Treasurer's Office; Issue Official Receipt
Release of building permit and Certificate

services.turnaround_time: 7 days (document evaluation) + 2 days (permit release) = **9 working days** note: documents are endorsed to assessor, treasury, mpdo, and bfp for assessment.

conditional_requirements.instruction: Additional requirements that may apply based on your situation:

options.condition: * for 2 Storey and Above
options.document: Two (2) copies of Electrical Design Analysis (Signed and sealed by Engineer)

options.condition: * for 3 Storey and Above
options.document: Two (2) copies of Soil Boring Test (Signed and sealed by Engineer)

options.condition: May be required based on your situation
options.document: Three (3) photocopies of Tax Declaration and DENR Certificate of claimant (if OCT/TCT is unavailable)

options.condition: May be required based on your situation
options.document: DPWH Clearance for Construction along National Road

options.condition: May be required based on your situation
options.document: Notarized Authorization Letter or Special Power of Attorney (SPA)

options.condition: May be required based on your situation
options.document: Photocopy of Valid I.D. of Owner/Signatory and Authorized Representative

options.condition: May be required based on your situation
options.document: Secretary's Certificate (If applicant is a corporation)

options.condition: May be required based on your situation
options.document: Affidavit of Undertaking (Notarized)

As built Plans (Signed and sealed by Professional In charge who undertook full time inspection and supervision)
One (1) photocopy of Valid PRC Licenses (PRC I.D.) of all involved professionals
Captioned Photographs of Site and Completed Building/Structure showing front, sides and rear areas and septic tank
Yellow Card Issued by the Electrical Service Provider
Vicinity Map

client_steps.action: Present and submit all the required documents
Payment to the cashier at Municipal Treasurer's Office; Process payment and issue Official Receipt
Release of Occupancy Permit; Grant/Issue Certificate

services.turnaround_time: 1 day (document review) + bfp site inspection + (payment) + 1 day (release) = **varies by bfp inspection** note: endorse to bfp for site inspection.

conditional_requirements.instruction: Additional requirements that may apply based on your situation:

options.condition: May be required based on your situation
options.document: Affidavit of Setbacks (Notarized)

services.service_name: Issuance of Certificate of Inspection for Road Worthiness

client_steps.action: Present and submit all the required documents from TRU
Present the tricycle to be inspected
Sign Logbook for release; Grant/Issue Certificate

services.processing_time: 5 minutes (document review) + 5 minutes (tricycle inspection) + 2 minutes (release) = **12 minutes** note: includes physical tricycle inspection by cm & m and administrative aide i.

fees.description: Processing time: 30 minutes (document review) + 30 minutes to 2 days (Mayor's signature) + 5 minutes (release) = 1-2 days

services.notes: The Titling Certificate will be forwarded to the Office of the Mayor for signature.

services.service_name: Admission of Paternity/R.A. 9255

FATHER: To prove child's filiation, any two (2) of: Employment Record, SSS/GSIS Record, Insurance Policy, Income Tax Return (ITR), SALN, Pag-ibig/Philhealth MDR, Medical Record of Child, School Record of Child, Baptismal Certificate

Receives the Supplemental Report Endorsement

Affidavit of Non-Employment
NBI Clearance
documents.note: Current with 6 months validity, purpose: For Change of First Name

documents.document: Police Clearance
documents.note: Current with 6 months validity, purpose: For Change of First Name

documents.document: Certificate of Marriage
Certificate of Live Birth of Child
Two (2) Government-issued ID / Valid Identification Card or CEDULA

supporting_documents_detail.note: The processor will determine applicable documents

Pay at the cashier
Claim corrected document
